items.title: Avoid
items.avoid: Shipping Claude-generated legal or medical advice without professional review.
items.prefer: Use Claude to draft questions or summaries; licensed experts decide.
items.why: High-stakes harm from hallucination or outdated guidance.
items.example: Draft patient handout → clinician edits before distribution.

items.title: Avoid
items.avoid: Trusting API parameter names from memory in production code.
items.prefer: Copy from current docs or schema; run integration tests.
items.why: Hallucinated SDK fields cause runtime failures.
